results.description: Build a production-ready remote MCP server for ChatGPT Apps/API integrations using read-only search/fetch tools over AgentSam R2, D1, docs, and Vectorize knowledge.
results.steps_json: ["Inspect current MCP Worker","Implement /health","Implement /sse","Implement search","Implement fetch","Use R2/D1/Vectorize sources","Add auth gate","Test with curl","Document ChatGPT connection"]
results.acceptance_criteria_json: ["/health returns ok","/sse exists","search returns MCP content array","fetch returns MCP content array","read-only by default","no secrets exposed","skills searchable from R2"]

results.description: Full sandbox deploy pipeline
Aggregates ai_usage_log, agentsam_tool_call_log, mcp_tool_calls, deployment_tracking into a daily rollup. Sends via Resend. Model resolved from agentsam_ai — never hardcoded.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"action":"query_ai_usage","table":"ai_usage_log"},{"step":2,"action":"query_tool_calls","table":"agentsam_tool_call_log"},{"step":3,"action":"query_mcp","table":"mcp_tool_calls"},{"step":4,"action":"query_deploys","table":"deployment_tracking"},{"step":5,"action":"generate_summary","model":"resolved_from_agentsam_ai"},{"step":6,"action":"send_email","via":"resend"},{"step":7,"action":"write_r2","path":"analytics/runs/YYYY-MM-DD.json"}]

results.description: Backfill missing embeddings in agent memory index.

results.description: Upload updated dashboard HTML/JS to R2 and verify routes are live. Operator-only. Requires approval before any R2 write.
Full read-only audit of D1 table structure, row counts, and dead tables. Safe to run anytime — no writes.
results.steps_json:
[
  {"step":1,"name":"List all tables","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"query":"SELECT name, sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"halt"},
  {"step":2,"name":"Row counts for ai_ tables","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"query":"SELECT 'ai_knowledge_base' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ai_knowledge_base UNION ALL SELECT 'ai_knowledge_chunks', COUNT(*) FROM ai_knowledge_chunks UNION ALL SELECT 'ai_workflow_pipelines', COUNT(*) FROM ai_workflow_pipelines UNION ALL SELECT 'ai_usage_log', COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":3,"name":"Row counts for mcp_ tables","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"query":"SELECT 'mcp_agent_sessions' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM mcp_agent_sessions UNION ALL SELECT 'mcp_tool_calls', COUNT(*) FROM mcp_tool_calls UNION ALL SELECT 'mcp_workflows', COUNT(*) FROM mcp_workflows UNION ALL SELECT 'mcp_workflow_runs', COUNT(*) FROM mcp_workflow_runs"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":4,"name":"Identify unindexed knowledge docs","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"query":"SELECT id, title, category, is_indexed, token_count FROM ai_knowledge_base WHERE is_indexed = 0 ORDER BY category"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":5,"name":"Generate audit summary","tool":"generate_execution_plan","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"context":"{{step_results}}","task":"Summarize dead tables, missing chunks, and top 3 recommended fixes"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"}
]

results.description: Pulls spend data, session costs, and tool call counts. Read-only. Run weekly or on demand.
results.steps_json:
[
  {"step":1,"name":"AI spend last 7 days","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"query":"SELECT date(created_at,'unixepoch') as day, SUM(computed_cost_usd) as cost_usd, COUNT(*) as calls, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) as tokens FROM agent_telemetry WHERE created_at > unixepoch('now','-7 days') GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":2,"name":"Cost by model last 7 days","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"query":"SELECT model_used, SUM(computed_cost_usd) as total_cost, COUNT(*) as calls FROM agent_telemetry WHERE created_at > unixepoch('now','-7 days') GROUP BY model_used ORDER BY total_cost DESC"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":3,"name":"MCP tool call breakdown","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"query":"SELECT tool_name, tool_category, COUNT(*) as calls, SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successes FROM mcp_tool_calls GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":4,"name":"Active session costs","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"query":"SELECT agent_id, panel, COUNT(*) as sessions, SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost, MAX(last_activity) as last_seen FROM mcp_agent_sessions GROUP BY agent_id, panel ORDER BY total_cost DESC"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":5,"name":"Summarize and flag anomalies","tool":"telemetry_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"task":"Flag any day with cost_usd > 5.00 or model with > 500 calls as anomaly"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"}
]

results.description: Queries telemetry and MCP services to surface errors, unhealthy services, and dead routes. Read-only.
results.steps_json:
[
  {"step":1,"name":"Check MCP service health","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_tester","params":{"query":"SELECT service_name, endpoint_url, health_status, last_health_check, entity_status FROM mcp_services WHERE is_active=1 ORDER BY health_status, service_name"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":2,"name":"Recent error rate from telemetry","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_tester","params":{"query":"SELECT date(created_at,'unixepoch') as day, COUNT(*) as total_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as errors FROM agent_telemetry WHERE created_at > unixepoch('now','-3 days') GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":3,"name":"Failed MCP tool calls","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_tester","params":{"query":"SELECT tool_name, error_message, COUNT(*) as failures FROM mcp_tool_calls WHERE status IN ('failed','error') AND created_at > datetime('now','-24 hours') GROUP BY tool_name, error_message ORDER BY failures DESC LIMIT 10"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":4,"name":"List R2 dashboard assets","tool":"r2_list","agent":"mcp_agent_tester","params":{"prefix":"static/dashboard/","limit":50},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":5,"name":"Summarize health status","tool":"generate_execution_plan","agent":"mcp_agent_tester","params":{"context":"{{step_results}}","task":"List services with health_status != healthy, tools with > 2 failures, and any missing R2 dashboard assets"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"}
]

results.description: Finds unindexed knowledge docs, chunks them, and marks ready for Vectorize. Builder executes — Architect reviews first.
results.steps_json:
[
  {"step":1,"name":"Find unindexed documents","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"query":"SELECT id, title, category, token_count, LENGTH(content) as content_len FROM ai_knowledge_base WHERE is_indexed=0 AND is_active=1 ORDER BY category, id"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"halt"},
  {"step":2,"name":"Find docs with missing chunks","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"query":"SELECT kb.id, kb.title, COUNT(kc.id) as chunk_count FROM ai_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_chunks kc ON kb.id = kc.knowledge_id WHERE kb.is_active=1 GROUP BY kb.id HAVING chunk_count = 0 ORDER BY kb.id"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":3,"name":"Review chunk gaps","tool":"generate_execution_plan","agent":"mcp_agent_architect","params":{"context":"{{step_results}}","task":"List all doc IDs with zero chunks and flag which categories have the most gaps. Propose chunk strategy."},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"},
  {"step":4,"name":"Write chunks to D1","tool":"d1_write","agent":"mcp_agent_builder","params":{"operation":"chunk_knowledge_base","source_table":"ai_knowledge_base","target_table":"ai_knowledge_chunks","strategy":"one_chunk_per_doc_under_500_tokens"},"requires_approval":true,"on_failure":"halt"},
  {"step":5,"name":"Mark docs indexed","tool":"d1_write","agent":"mcp_agent_builder","params":{"query":"UPDATE ai_knowledge_base SET is_indexed=1, updated_at=unixepoch() WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT knowledge_id FROM ai_knowledge_chunks)"},"requires_approval":true,"on_failure":"halt"},
  {"step":6,"name":"Verify chunk counts","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_tester","params":{"query":"SELECT COUNT(*) as total_chunks, COUNT(DISTINCT knowledge_id) as docs_chunked FROM ai_knowledge_chunks"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"warn"}
]

results.display_name: CIDI — Agent UI: sandbox R2 then production R2
results.description: Step 1: sync repo dashboard + Vite outputs to agent-sam-sandbox-cidi (./scripts/upload-repo-to-r2-sandbox.sh). Step 2: after Sam approval, promote agent shell + bundle to agent-sam (PROMOTE_OK=1 ./scripts/promote-agent-dashboard-to-production.sh). Worker deploy only with deploy approved. Full playbook: docs/CURSOR_HANDOFF_D1_CIDI_ORCHESTRATION.md
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Verify sandbox + prod buckets in D1","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"query":"SELECT id, bucket_name, display_name FROM r2_buckets WHERE id IN ('r2_agent_sam','r2_agent_sam_sandbox_cidi') ORDER BY bucket_name"},"requires_approval":false,"on_failure":"halt","cidi_handoff":"From repo root: ./scripts/upload-repo-to-r2-sandbox.sh (build agent-dashboard / overview-dashboard first if JSX changed)"},{"step":2,"name":"Production promotion gate","tool":"d1_query","agent":"mcp_agent_operator","params":{"query":"SELECT id, title, status FROM roadmap_steps WHERE id IN ('step_sandbox_agent_promote_workflow','step_agent_theme_initial_paint')"},"requires_approval":true,"on_failure":"halt","cidi_handoff":"PROMOTE_OK=1 ./scripts/promote-agent-dashboard-to-production.sh; if worker.js changed, Sam must type deploy approved before wrangler deploy"}]

results.description: The 2-step assurance protocol: deploy to sandbox first, await Sam approval, then promote to production. Zero production risk.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Build + Deploy to Sandbox","tool":"terminal_execute","cmd":"cd agent-dashboard && npm run build && ./scripts/upload-repo-to-r2-sandbox.sh","verify":"GET https://inneranimal-dashboard.meauxbility.workers.dev/dashboard/agent"},{"step":2,"name":"Sam Review","type":"human_approval","message":"Review sandbox at https://inneranimal-dashboard.meauxbility.workers.dev/dashboard/agent — type APPROVE to promote to production"},{"step":3,"name":"Promote to Production","tool":"terminal_execute","cmd":"PROMOTE_OK=1 ./scripts/promote-agent-dashboard-to-production.sh","requires_approval":true,"verify":"GET https://inneranimalmedia.com/dashboard/agent"}]

results.description: Audits all secrets in worker_env for expiry, tests connectivity, flags rotation_due. Never touches actual secret values.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Query worker_env for near-expiry","tool":"d1_query","sql":"SELECT env_name,description,last_tested_at FROM worker_env WHERE test_status != 'ok' OR last_tested_at < datetime('now','-7 days') ORDER BY env_name"},{"step":2,"name":"Test each active key","tool":"terminal_execute","cmd":"curl -s https://inneranimalmedia.com/api/env/test/all"},{"step":3,"name":"Write rotation report to agent_memory_index","tool":"d1_write"}]

results.description: End-to-end client setup: D1 tenant row, Stripe customer, Resend domain, worker deployment, cidi workflow creation.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Create tenant + client rows in D1"},{"step":2,"name":"Create Stripe customer"},{"step":3,"name":"Configure Resend sending domain"},{"step":4,"name":"Deploy client worker"},{"step":5,"name":"Create cidi workflow entry"},{"step":6,"name":"Send welcome email via Resend"},{"step":7,"name":"Verify all systems green"}]

results.description: Purges old mcp_tool_calls (>30 days), compresses mcp_usage_log into daily rollups, runs ANALYZE. Run weekly.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Count rows before","tool":"d1_query","sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mcp_tool_calls"},{"step":2,"name":"Delete old tool calls","tool":"d1_write","sql":"DELETE FROM mcp_tool_calls WHERE created_at < datetime('now','-30 days')"},{"step":3,"name":"Rollup usage_log","tool":"d1_write"},{"step":4,"name":"Count rows after + report diff"}]

results.description: Triggered by GitHub webhook on PR open. Audits changed files, runs d1 schema check if migrations present, posts summary comment.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Fetch PR diff from GitHub API"},{"step":2,"name":"Audit changed files for schema migrations"},{"step":3,"name":"Run worker syntax check"},{"step":4,"name":"Post summary comment to PR"}]

results.description: Pulls todays sessions, spend, deploy status, client activity, webhook health, and compiles a morning briefing.
results.steps_json: [{"step":1,"name":"Pull AI spend last 24h","tool":"d1_query"},{"step":2,"name":"Pull deployments last 24h","tool":"d1_query"},{"step":3,"name":"Pull webhook_events last 24h","tool":"d1_query"},{"step":4,"name":"Pull active cidi workflows","tool":"d1_query"},{"step":5,"name":"Compile briefing","tool":"agent_chat"},{"step":6,"name":"Write to agent_memory_index"}]
